cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby [hlp]nakreslila tečku[/hlp], pak [hlp]zvedla pero[/hlp], [hlp]posunula se dopředu o 120 pixelů[/hlp], [hlp]spustila pero[/hlp] a [hlp]nakreslila druhou tečku[/hlp].
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_dot"><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">120</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_dot"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
